title: cacalia foliosa
intro: Cacalia foliosa, also known as the leafy cacalia or Chinese leafy cacalia, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cacalia foliosa include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis pain, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed raw or in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
